data.description:

The latest announcement is out from I Synergy Group Ltd. ( (AU:IS3) ).

I Synergy Group Limited has scheduled its Annual General Meeting for 11:00am AEST on 29 May 2026 at 24-26 Kent Street, Millers Point, New South Wales, and has encouraged shareholders to lodge proxy votes by 11:00am AEST on 27 May 2026 if they cannot attend in person. The company will provide the Notice of Meeting and related materials exclusively online through its share registry, the ASX company information page and its own website, reflecting a shift away from physical mailings and reinforcing digital-first governance practices, while confirming that voting will be conducted by poll and eligibility determined as of 7:00pm AEST on 27 March 2026.

More about I Synergy Group Ltd.

I Synergy Group Limited (ASX: IS3) is an Australia-listed company that engages shareholders through regular governance processes, including annual general meetings, and communicates primarily via digital channels such as its website and share registry platforms.

data.title: USP Group Unit Named Nationwide Distributor for IQAir in Indonesia
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from USP Group Limited ( (SG:BRS) ) is now available.

USP Group Limited’s Indonesian subsidiary, PT Supratechnic Instrumentasi Indonesia, has been appointed nationwide distributor for Swiss air quality brand IQAir in Indonesia, marking the Supratechnic group’s second nationwide distributorship for the brand. The move expands the group’s presence in air quality and healthcare solutions while the company’s securities remain under trading suspension.

As part of the rollout, Supratechnic plans to launch the Suprayi.com digital platform in Indonesia in 2026, giving consumers and institutions direct access to genuine IQAir products, local warranty, certified technical consultation, and after‑sales support. The appointment strengthens Supratechnic’s healthcare division and deepens its market development across Indonesia from its Jakarta-based distribution hub.

More about USP Group Limited

USP Group Limited, incorporated in Singapore and currently under judicial management, operates through its Supratechnic group, which focuses on technical and healthcare-related products. The group serves regional markets via subsidiaries such as PT Supratechnic Instrumentasi Indonesia, leveraging distribution hubs like Jakarta to expand its footprint in healthcare and air quality solutions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$3.79M

data.title: African Gold completes Montage schemes and moves to delist from ASX
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

African Gold Ltd. ( (AU:A1G) ) has issued an announcement.

African Gold Ltd. has completed court-approved schemes of arrangement under which all its shares have been transferred to Montage and all existing options have been cancelled in exchange for new Montage securities. Eligible shareholders received 0.0628 new Montage shares for each African Gold share, while optionholders received 0.0628 new Montage options per cancelled African Gold option.

New Montage shares that would otherwise have gone to ineligible foreign shareholders have been issued to a nominee for sale on the TSX, with net proceeds to be distributed to those investors. Trading in African Gold shares was suspended on 20 April 2026, and the company has applied for removal from the ASX official list, effectively ending its status as a standalone listed entity and consolidating ownership under Montage.

More about African Gold Ltd.

African Gold Ltd. is an Australian-listed gold exploration and development company, with its shares previously traded on the ASX under the ticker A1G. The company focuses on advancing gold assets in Africa, positioning itself within the broader precious metals exploration and mining sector.

Average Trading Volume: 2,373,107

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$592.2M

data.title: Bank of Ireland to Redeem £50m Callable Notes a Year Early
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bank Of Ireland Group plc ( (DE:BIRG) ) just unveiled an update.

Bank of Ireland Group plc has announced that it will exercise its issuer call option to redeem in full its GBP 50 million Fixed Rate Reset Callable Notes, Series 740, originally due June 3, 2027, on the optional redemption date of June 3, 2026. The notes will be redeemed at their optional redemption amount plus accrued and unpaid interest up to but excluding the redemption date, after which the notes will be cancelled and delisted from Euronext Dublin, reflecting the bank’s active management of its capital and funding profile.

Following the redemption, no further interest will be paid on the notes and the issuer will request cancellation of their listing and trading admission on the regulated market of Euronext Dublin. The move underscores Bank of Ireland’s willingness to optimize its liability structure and may signal confidence in its access to alternative funding sources and overall capital position, with operational implications for noteholders as the instrument is retired ahead of its original maturity.

More about Bank Of Ireland Group plc

Bank of Ireland Group plc is a diversified financial services and banking group headquartered in Ireland, operating across retail, corporate and treasury activities. It issues debt instruments in international capital markets, including notes under its €25 billion Euro Note Programme, to support its funding and balance sheet management needs.

See more data about BIRG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Gigante Salmon AS ( (DE:96M) ) has provided an announcement.

Gigante Salmon AS has called its annual general meeting for 13 May 2026 at its headquarters in Bodø, with formal notice to be distributed to all registered shareholders and documents made available on the company’s website. The meeting underscores the company’s progression as a listed land-based aquaculture player, giving investors a scheduled forum for governance and oversight as it advances construction of its first facility and refines its hybrid flow-through concept in Norway’s salmon industry.

By adhering to regulatory disclosure requirements under the Norwegian Securities Trading Act, Gigante Salmon reinforces its commitment to transparency in a sector facing growing scrutiny over sustainability and fish welfare. The timing of the meeting is likely to focus stakeholder attention on project milestones, financing needs, and operational plans for scaling its land-based model, factors that could influence perceptions of its competitiveness versus conventional sea-based salmon farmers.

More about Gigante Salmon AS

Gigante Salmon AS is a Norwegian land-based salmon farming company developing its first production facility on Lille Indre Rosøy in Rødøy. Its aquaculture concept uses a flow-through system that combines advantages of conventional and land-based salmon farming while seeking to avoid environmental and operational issues seen in traditional sea-based operations.

Current Market Cap: NOK1.91B

European Metals Holdings Limited has notified the ASX of its intention to issue up to 3.6 million performance rights, which will expire three years from the date of issue. Celebrus Technologies ( (GB:CLBS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Celebrus Technologies has repurchased 50,000 of its own ordinary shares at a volume-weighted average price of 85 pence per share, with the stock to be held in treasury, in a move that can signal confidence in the company’s valuation and capital position. Following this transaction, the company now has 40,431,453 shares in issue, of which 1,887,566 are held in treasury, leaving 38,543,887 voting shares outstanding, a key figure for investors monitoring disclosure thresholds under U.K. market rules.

The updated share count and voting rights position may affect how institutional and other shareholders assess their holdings relative to regulatory reporting requirements. The buyback also modestly reduces the free float, potentially impacting liquidity while slightly enhancing earnings and ownership percentages for remaining shareholders, depending on future use of the treasury shares.

data.title: Essentra Cancels 200,000 Shares in Ongoing Buyback Programme
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Essentra ( (GB:ESNT) ) is now available.

Essentra has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing 200,000 ordinary shares of 25 pence each on the London Stock Exchange between 22 and 27 April 2026 at volume‑weighted average prices ranging from about 81.6p to 84.4p. The company plans to cancel these shares, which will reduce the number of shares in issue and leave 284,327,744 ordinary shares outstanding (excluding treasury shares), thereby adjusting the total voting rights used by investors for regulatory disclosure thresholds.

The latest transactions, carried out through Peel Hunt LLP, underline Essentra’s ongoing capital management strategy aimed at shrinking its free‑float equity base. The reduction in voting share capital may marginally enhance earnings per share and alter individual shareholders’ percentage holdings, while also clarifying the new denominator investors must use when assessing whether they must notify changes in their stakes under U.K. disclosure rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ESNT) stock is a Buy with a £130.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Essentra stock, see the GB:ESNT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ESNT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ESNT is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak profitability and deteriorating cash flow trends, alongside a very high P/E multiple. Technical indicators also lean bearish with the price below key moving averages and a negative MACD, while the balance sheet and dividend yield provide only modest support.

To see Spark’s full report on ESNT stock, click here.

More about Essentra

Essentra plc is a U.K.-listed industrial company whose shares trade on the London Stock Exchange. The group operates through a structure that allows it to conduct share repurchases and manage its capital base, with ordinary shares of 25 pence each forming its primary equity securities for investors.
